title: Algebra
summary: 9709 P2 algebra — polynomial division, factor theorem, partial fractions, and binomial expansion with PhET expression exchange.
learningObjectives: Divide polynomials and apply the factor theorem.
Decompose rational functions into partial fractions.
Expand (1 + x)ⁿ for non-integer n when |x| < 1.

simpleExplanation.title: Polynomial tools for P2
simpleExplanation.summary: Algebra skills from P2 feed integration in P3. Factor theorem links roots to factors; partial fractions simplify rational integrands.
steps: Factor theorem: (x − a) is a factor iff f(a) = 0.
Partial fractions: proper fraction → simpler terms.
Modulus: |x| = x if x ≥ 0, −x if x < 0 — split cases.

sections.content: **Algebra** (2.1) on P2 is procedural but easy to lose marks on **partial fraction setup**. Show **equating coefficients** clearly.
